name: HMS Mousa (T 295)
events: 31 Jul 1943 Around 0825 B/31, HMS Torbay (Lt. R.J. Clutterbuck, RN) ended her 17th war patrol at Algiers.
She had been escorted in by HMS Mousa (Lt. D.J. Hutton, DSC, RNVR) which had joined at 0640 B/31. (1)

2 Aug 1943 Around 0820 B/2, HMS Templar (Lt. D.J. Beckley, DSO, RN) ended her 3rd war patrol (2nd in the Mediterranean) at Algiers. She was escorted in by HMS Mousa (Lt. D.J. Hutton, DSC, RNVR) which had joined around 0610 B/2. (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
